visa_types.name: Business
visa_types.documents_required:
- All documents submitted must be in English language.
- Visa Application form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6YwVEGHda53VyU3KhgPUjY/1708264f17b38e382424720921fffd2b/new-sweden-application-form-2024.pdf) to be completed, signed and dated. Please ensure that application forms for minors are signed by both parents. To help us process your application quickly and accurately, please complete the Sweden Visa Application Form (VAF) electronically using the editable PDF available on this site, print the typed copy and carry it with appointment letter during your visit to the visa application centre. Completing the form electronically reduces counter waiting time and helps avoid errors caused by illegible handwriting.
Note: Applicants who arrive without a form completed electronically will still be accepted with a completed handwritten form; however, they should expect additional processing time at Visa Application Centre.
- The forms must be completed either in Swedish or in English. Documents issued by the authorities in your country of origin are to be submitted together with a translation in Swedish or English by an authorised translator.
- Checklist for Iraqi Citizens living in Iraq 
- When a child travels with one parent (or alone)
- When a minor travels with one parent or alone a so-called “consent letter for minors travelling abroad” is needed.
- Click here to download consent letter
visa_types.visa_fees:
[swe > irq > en > Business > Visa Fees]
The visa fee is subject to change without notice.
Please Note:
- The Visa fee will be paid in cash at Sweden Visa Application Centre, Iraq with service fee of 60 Euros.
- The visa application Centre offers an optional service at a nominal additional cost:
- All Visa Fee charges, VFS service charges and all optional services are to be paid in cash only in USD as per the exchange rate provided by the Embassy.
- Fees are non-refundable.
visa_types.processing_time:
Information about processing times
“Please note that all visa applications are handled and decided on by the Regional Migration Hub at the Swedish Embassy in Amman, Jordan. The Embassy urges all applicants to apply well in advance of the intended entry into the Schengen area. The visa processing time is 15 working days from the date when the applications reach the Regional Migration Hub. Note that it also takes time to transfer the applications to and from the Regional Migration Hub in Amman, in total at least 25-30 days from submission of application at VFS until the passport may be picked up.”
visa_types.overview:
Overview
This category of visa caters to people wishing to visit Sweden for a maximum of 3 months for business purposes. Please note that if you are going to work for a period less than 3 month you will need both a work permit and a Schengen visa and if that is the case you should contact the Embassy of Sweden for consultation.
Applicants will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This category of visa caters to people wishing to visit Sweden for a maximum of 3 months for business purposes. Please note that if you are going to work for a period less than 3 month you will need both a work permit and a Schengen visa and if that is the case you should contact the Embassy of Sweden for consultation.
Applicants will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category.

## Visa Fees

[swe > irq > en > Business > Visa Fees]
The visa fee is subject to change without notice.
Please Note:
- The Visa fee will be paid in cash at Sweden Visa Application Centre, Iraq with service fee of 60 Euros.
- The visa application Centre offers an optional service at a nominal additional cost:
- All Visa Fee charges, VFS service charges and all optional services are to be paid in cash only in USD as per the exchange rate provided by the Embassy.
- Fees are non-refundable.

## Documents Required
- All documents submitted must be in English language.
- Visa Application form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6YwVEGHda53VyU3KhgPUjY/1708264f17b38e382424720921fffd2b/new-sweden-application-form-2024.pdf) to be completed, signed and dated. Please ensure that application forms for minors are signed by both parents. To help us process your application quickly and accurately, please complete the Sweden Visa Application Form (VAF) electronically using the editable PDF available on this site, print the typed copy and carry it with appointment letter during your visit to the visa application centre. Completing the form electronically reduces counter waiting time and helps avoid errors caused by illegible handwriting.
Note: Applicants who arrive without a form completed electronically will still be accepted with a completed handwritten form; however, they should expect additional processing time at Visa Application Centre.
- The forms must be completed either in Swedish or in English. Documents issued by the authorities in your country of origin are to be submitted together with a translation in Swedish or English by an authorised translator.
- Checklist for Iraqi Citizens living in Iraq 
- When a child travels with one parent (or alone)
- When a minor travels with one parent or alone a so-called “consent letter for minors travelling abroad” is needed.
- Click here to download consent letter

## Photo Specifications
Two [2] photographs of passport style and size [35 x 45 mm] for all applicants, including minors. Your photograph must be:
- color photo
- recent and of true likeness
- showing full face
- taken without headgear
- head coverings and hats are only acceptable due to religious beliefs, and even then, may not cover any portion of the applicant's face
- taken against a plain, evenly lit and light background.

## Processing Time
Information about processing times
“Please note that all visa applications are handled and decided on by the Regional Migration Hub at the Swedish Embassy in Amman, Jordan. The Embassy urges all applicants to apply well in advance of the intended entry into the Schengen area. The visa processing time is 15 working days from the date when the applications reach the Regional Migration Hub. Note that it also takes time to transfer the applications to and from the Regional Migration Hub in Amman, in total at least 25-30 days from submission of application at VFS until the passport may be picked up.”

## Download Forms
Application form for Schengen Visa

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This category of visa caters for people wishing to visit Sweden for tourism for a period of maximum 3 months.
Applicants will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category.

## Overview
This category of visa caters for people wishing to visit Sweden for tourism for a period of maximum 3 months.
Applicants will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category.

## Visa Fees

Please Note:

- Fees are non-refundable.

## Documents Required
- All documents submitted must be in English language.
- Visa Application form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6YwVEGHda53VyU3KhgPUjY/1708264f17b38e382424720921fffd2b/new-sweden-application-form-2024.pdf) to be completed, signed and dated. Please ensure that application forms for minors are signed by both parents. To help us process your application quickly and accurately, please complete the Sweden Visa Application Form (VAF) electronically using the editable PDF available on this site, print the typed copy and carry it with appointment letter during your visit to the visa application centre. Completing the form electronically reduces counter waiting time and helps avoid errors caused by illegible handwriting.
Note: Applicants who arrive without a form completed electronically will still be accepted with a completed handwritten form; however, they should expect additional processing time at Visa Application Centre.
- The forms must be completed either in Swedish or in English. Documents issued by the authorities in your country of origin are to be submitted together with a translation in Swedish or English by an authorised translator.
- Checklist for Iraqi Citizens living in Iraq 
- When a child travels with one parent (or alone)
- When a minor travels with one parent or alone a so-called “consent letter for minors travelling abroad” is needed.
- Click here to download consent letter

## Photo Specifications
Two [2] photographs of passport style and size [35 x 45 mm] for all applicants, including minors. Your photograph must be:
- color photo
- recent and of true likeness
- showing full face
- taken without headgear
- head coverings and hats are only acceptable due to religious beliefs, and even then, may not cover any portion of the applicant's face
- taken against a plain, evenly lit and light background.

## Processing Time
Information about processing times
“Please note that all visa applications are handled and decided on by the Regional Migration Hub at the Swedish Embassy in Amman, Jordan. The Embassy urges all applicants to apply well in advance of the intended entry into the Schengen area. The visa processing time is 15 working days from the date when the applications reach the Regional Migration Hub. Note that it also takes time to transfer the applications to and from the Regional Migration Hub in Amman, in total at least 25-30 days from submission of application at VFS until the passport may be picked up.”
